text:
Statistical Information 
System Identifier (MSIS_ID). Encrypted Medicaid state-assigned beneficiary unique identifier. 
LONG NAME: MSIS_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
32 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string, up to 20 characters 
(Ex. 9Q81866B302C768A539B) 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
The AHC Bridge organizations obtained Medicaid beneficiary identifying information (e.g., Medicaid ID 
card, state, zip code, first and last
